The Moon as the Navamsa Lord makes the native do agricultural
work. trade in conches. pear1s, lotus flowers and the like. water·bome
products and serve fair sex for a living.
Sugc-rcane {sugar factories). milk {dairy farms). clothes (texti5e milts),
flowers toosmetics and scents). sports and games. and cereals like paddy,
etc. • are represented by the Moon.
When the Navamsa is owned by Mars. the Native deals in metals
like copper. lead. bell metal. silver and gold, and in sulphur and gunpowder
ingredients. His work will be very near fire. He may be engaged in
